caption: A man with a tall, spiked gray wig, glasses, and headphones is speaking into a professional microphone in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders. Behind him, the wall is decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing racks with garments, including a yellow shirt with "LEE" visible. A red and white logo with the text "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" is displayed on the left and right sides of the screen. As the sequence progresses, the man gestures with his right hand and shifts his facial expression while speaking, moving his head slightly. He remains seated in the same position throughout the scene, with the microphone and background elements remaining static.
